mano_cua.result_summary: mano-cua 导航到 Day Picker directive Reactive 区域，打开 DevTools Elements 面板检查日期选择器 input 元素。首次检查（ng-untouched 状态，即无任何用户交互前）发现 form 和 input 均为 ng-untouched ng-dirty ng-valid，ng-untouched 证明用户未操作，但 ng-dirty 已存在。外层容器 form 正确为 ng-pristine。Console 查询 document.querySelector('#datePickerDirDayReactive form').className 返回 ng-dirty。dpDayPicker 在 Reactive Form 中初始化时错误地将 FormControl 标记为 dirty。

Both the reactive form and the date picker input have `ng-dirty` class.

## 🔴 BUG REPORT: dpDayPicker Reactive Form - Initial State is ng-dirty (Abnormal)

### Test Environment
- **URL**: `http://localhost:4200`
- **Component**: `angular-datepicker` demo page
- **Section**: "Day Picker directive Reactive" (`#datePickerDirDayReactive`)
- **Test Date**: April 15, 2026

### Test Steps Performed
1. Navigated to the "Day Picker directive Reactive" section via sidebar
2. Opened Chrome DevTools (F12)
3. Inspected the form and input elements in the Elements panel
4. Ran JavaScript queries in the Console to verify CSS classes

### Evidence Collected

#### 1. DevTools Elements Panel (Breadcrumb - First Inspection, Before Any User Interaction)
When the form was in `ng-untouched` state (no user interaction), the Elements panel breadcrumb showed:
- **Outer container form**: `form.ng-untouched.ng-pristine.ng-valid` ✅ (Normal - pristine)
- **Reactive form inside `#datePickerDirDayReactive`**: `form.ng-untouched.ng-dirty.ng-valid` ❌ (**ABNORMAL - dirty but untouched!**)
- **Date picker input**: `input.ng-untouched.ng-dirty.ng-valid` ❌ (**ABNORMAL - dirty but untouched!**)

#### 2. DevTools Elements Panel (HTML Class Attribute)
```html
<form class="ng-untouched ng-dirty ng-valid">  <!-- ABNORMAL: ng-dirty without interaction -->
<input class="ng-untouched ng-dirty ng-valid" ...>  <!-- ABNORMAL: ng-dirty without interaction -->
```

#### 3. JavaScript Console Queries (After Some Interaction)

document.querySelector('#datePickerDirDayReactive form').className
